LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LINDA JENKINSON, LES CONCIERGES INC., RHONDA MEYER, RAMESH PATEL, JOSEPH RUKUS, MIKE TRENARY, KAREN VAN PARIS AND TRISH WONG'S MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY (C.C.P. SECTION 391.1); REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO MARCH 20, 2007 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS LINDA JENKINSON, LES CONCIERGES INC., RHONDA MEYER, RAMESH PATEL, JOSEPH RUKUS, MIKE TRENARY, KAREN VAN PARIS AND TRISH WONG'S MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY (C.C.P. 391.1) REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DISCOVERY ABUSES ARE TO BE ADDRESSED BY THE DISCOVERY COMMISSIONER AND IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE SOUGHT THIS REMEDY. THIS CASE IS BASED ON DIFFERENT PARTIES THAN WERE IN THE KOHLER AND TRIDENT CASES. ALTHOUGH THE COURT IS TROUBLED BY THE FACT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT ESTABLISHED, AS YET, THAT PLAINTIFF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IN THIS CASE UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 391.1. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600.

Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANTS LINDA JENKINSON, LES CONCIERGES INC., RHONDA MEYER, RAMESH PATEL, JOSEPH RUKUS, MIKE TRENARY, KAREN VAN PARIS AND TRISH WONG'S Motion To Require Plaintiff To Furnish Security (C.C.P. 391.1) Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Defendants' Motion To Require Plaintiff To Furnish Security IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DISCOVERY ABUSES ARE TO BE ADDRESSED BY THE DISCOVERY COMMISSIONER AND IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE SOUGHT THIS REMEDY. THIS CASE IS BASED ON DIFFERENT PARTIES THAN WERE IN THE KOHLER AND TRIDENT CASES. ALTHOUGH THE COURT IS TROUBLED BY THE FACT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT ESTABLISHED, AS YET, THAT PLAINTIFF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IN THIS CASE UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 391.1. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600. (302/PJM)
